technical.recipeCost.recomputeModal.intr: Re-roll the BOM cost from current material rates.
technical.recipeCost.recomputeModal.note: Non-destructive — re-rolls Σ(line qty × current cost/kg) live for the selected product. Nothing is overwritten; the figure simply refreshes from the latest item costs.
technical.routings.manager.selectItemPro: Select an item to view its routings.
technical.routings.manager.loadError: Unable to load routings. Please try again.
technical.routings.manager.emptyBody: No routings yet for this item.
technical.routings.manager.emptyBodyCanW: Create the first routing version to define its operations.
technical.routings.manager.permissionDen: You can view routings but do not have permission to author them (technical.bom.create).
technical.routings.manager.modalIntro: Operations run in order (op 1 → n). Each operation binds a line or a machine (V-TEC-61) and a manufacturing-operation name from the reference (V-TEC-63).
technical.routings.manager.errForbidden: You do not have permission to author routings.
technical.routings.manager.errInvalidInp: Please check the operation values and try again.
technical.routings.manager.errNotFound: That item or routing no longer exists.
technical.routings.manager.errAlreadyExi: A routing with that version already exists for this item.
technical.routings.manager.errInvalidSta: Only a draft routing may be edited or transitioned that way.
technical.routings.manager.errSequenceGa: Operation numbers must be contiguous from 1 (V-TEC-60).
technical.routings.manager.errNoResource: Every operation must bind a line or machine (V-TEC-61).
technical.routings.manager.errZeroRunTim: Production operations need a run time greater than 0 (V-TEC-62).
technical.routings.manager.errUnknownOpe: An operation name is not in the manufacturing-operations reference (V-TEC-63).
technical.routings.manager.errGeneric: Could not save the routing. Please try again.
